    L

    length - Variable in class model.Road
     
    Location - Class in model
    An abstract sealed class representing a generic location in a Cartesian coordinate system.
    Location(String, LocationType, double, double, int) - Constructor for class model.Location
    Constructs a new Location.
    locations - Variable in class model.Problem
     
    locationType - Variable in class model.Location
     
    LocationType - Enum Class in enums
    Represents the various types of locations available in the routing system.
    LocationType() - Constructor for enum class enums.LocationType
     
    locationTypeToString() - Method in class model.Location
    Converts the location's enum type to a readable string format.
